title: Egyptian Herb Crumble
description: A twist on the classic crumble with the added flavor of Egyptian herbs. Perfect for a light dinner or snack.

ingredients.name: egyptian herbs
ingredients.notes: such as parsley, cilantro, and dill

instructions: Cut the chewy bread into 1-inch cubes.
In a bowl, mix together the egyptian herbs and vegetable oil.
Add the herb crumble and mix until crumbly.
Add the salt and mix until combined.
Add the bread cubes to the bowl and toss until they are evenly coated with the herb crumble mixture.
Transfer the bread mixture to a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
